reference_block.name: scope
reference_block.title: Scope
reference_block.statement: Use this bundle for OpenAI API integration, model response generation, retrieval, embeddings, batch jobs, webhooks, realtime interaction, evals and safety control work.
Do not use this bundle as a substitute for live account settings, model availability, pricing, usage limits, project permissions or secret inspection.

reference_block.name: source-rule
reference_block.title: Source rule
reference_block.statement: Only treat official OpenAI documentation as authoritative for OpenAI API and platform claims in this bundle.
If a requested behaviour is not supported by the loaded OpenAI docs, state the evidence gap and avoid implementation claims.
